features.name: Audio File Viewer
features.description: Previews browser-supported audio files (mp3, wav, flac, ogg, opus, m4a, aac, weba) inline using the native browser audio player. Registered as a file viewer so Datagrok opens audio files automatically in the appropriate panel.
features.evidence_summary: audioViewer is the sole core function for audio; readme documents the package's overall audio/video viewer capabilities.

features.name: Video File Viewer
features.description: Previews browser-supported video files (mp4, m4v, webm, ogv, mov) inline using the native browser video player. Registered as a file viewer so Datagrok opens video files automatically in the appropriate panel.
features.evidence_summary: videoViewer is the sole core function for video; credits doc lists third-party libraries used across the Media package.
